notes: Converted the FHIR-store fhir subset of the Healthcare API v1 Discovery document. The adaptor's single public operation, createFhirResource, POSTs a FHIR resource to /v1/projects/{p}/locations/{r}/datasets/{d}/fhirStores/{f}/fhir/{resourceType} (path confirmed from the adaptor's compiled source). Read and type-level search interactions on the same store are included so the mock has meaningful GET responses and seed collections. FHIR resources are modeled as a generic FhirResource (resourceType required, additionalProperties true) with a Patient example, plus Bundle and OperationOutcome; individual FHIR resource types are not enumerated.
